mapper.sql:
WITH ITEM_INFO AS ( SELECT TIT.WORK_TMPL_ID ,COUNT(DISTINCT TIT.ITEM_ID) AS DOC_CNT ,LISTAGG(IT.ITEM_NM, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY IT.ITEM_NM) AS ITEM_NM ,LISTAGG(IT.REQUEST_YN, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY IT.REQUEST_YN) AS REQUEST_YN FROM NMCP_WORK_TMPL_ITEM@DL_MCP TIT ,NMCP_WORK_ITEM@DL_MCP IT WHERE TIT.ITEM_ID = IT.ITEM_ID GROUP BY TIT.WORK_TMPL_ID ), OWNER_INFO AS ( SELECT TOW.WORK_TMPL_ID ,LISTAGG(OW.OWNER_NM, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY OW.OWNER_NM) AS OWNER_NM FROM NMCP_WORK_TMPL_OWNER@DL_MCP TOW ,NMCP_WORK_OWNER@DL_MCP OW WHERE TOW.OWNER_ID = OW.OWNER_ID GROUP BY TOW.WORK_TMPL_ID ), RQSTR_INFO AS ( SELECT TRQ.WORK_TMPL_ID ,LISTAGG(RQ.RQSTR_NM, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY RQ.RQSTR_NM) AS RQSTR_NM FROM NMCP_WORK_TMPL_RQSTR@DL_MCP TRQ ,NMCP_WORK_RQSTR@DL_MCP RQ WHERE TRQ.RQSTR_ID = RQ.RQSTR_ID GROUP BY TRQ.WORK_TMPL_ID ) SELECT TMPL.WORK_TMPL_ID ,TMPL.WORK_TMPL_NM ,TMPL.WORK_ID ,(SELECT WORK_NM FROM EMV_SCAN_WORK@DL_MCP WHERE WORK_ID = TMPL.WORK_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS WORK_NM ,NVL(I.DOC_CNT,0) AS DOC_CNT ,I.ITEM_NM ,I.REQUEST_YN ,O.OWNER_NM ,R.RQSTR_NM ,TO_CHAR(TMPL.START_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS START_DT ,TO_CHAR(TMPL.END_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS END_DT ,FN_GET_USRNM(TMPL.CRET_ID) AS CRET_NM ,TO_CHAR(TMPL.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDD') AS CRET_DT ,FN_GET_USRNM(TMPL.AMD_ID) AS AMD_NM ,TO_CHAR(TMPL.AMD_DT,'YYYYMMDD') AS AMD_DT ,TMPL.USE_YN ,FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0011', TMPL.USE_YN) AS USE_YN_NM FROM NMCP_WORK_TMPL@DL_MCP TMPL ,ITEM_INFO I ,OWNER_INFO O ,RQSTR_INFO R WHERE 1=1 AND TMPL.WORK_TMPL_ID = I.WORK_TMPL_ID AND TMPL.WORK_TMPL_ID = O.WORK_TMPL_ID AND TMPL.WORK_TMPL_ID = R.WORK_TMPL_ID AND TO_DATE(#{searchBaseDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TRUNC(TMPL.START_DT) AND TRUNC(TMPL.END_DT)
AND TMPL.WORK_ID = #{workId}
AND UPPER(TMPL.WORK_TMPL_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{workTmplNm}) || '%'
AND UPPER(I.ITEM_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{itemNm}) || '%'
AND UPPER(O.OWNER_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{ownerNm}) || '%'
AND UPPER(R.RQSTR_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{rqstrNm}) || '%'
AND TMPL.USE_YN = #{useYn}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NMCP_WORK_TMPL_RQSTR@DL_MCP WTR WHERE WTR.WORK_TMPL_ID = TMPL.WORK_TMPL_ID AND WTR.RQSTR_ID = #{rqstrId} )
ORDER BY TMPL.WORK_TMPL_ID DESC
mapper.select: /*WorkMgmtMapper.getWorkItemList*/ SELECT DECODE(B.ITEM_ID, NULL, '0', '1') AS ROW_CHECK ,A.ITEM_ID ,A.STATUS ,A.ITEM_NM ,A.REQUEST_YN ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.CRET_ID) AS CRET_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.CRET_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CRET_DT ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.AMD_ID) AS AMD_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.AMD_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS AMD_DT FROM NMCP_WORK_ITEM@DL_MCP A ,NMCP_WORK_TMPL_ITEM@DL_MCP B WHERE A.ITEM_ID = B.ITEM_ID(+) AND B.WORK_TMPL_ID(+) = #{workTmplId} AND (A.STATUS = 'A' OR B.ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY ROW_CHECK DESC, A.ITEM_NM
mapper.insert: /* WorkMgmtMapper.insertWorkOwner */ INSERT INTO NMCP_WORK_OWNER@DL_MCP ( OWNER_ID ,OWNER_NM ,STATUS ,CRET_ID ,CRET_DT ) VALUES ( TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SQ_WORK_OWNER.NEXTVAL@DL_MCP, 4, '0') ,#{ownerNm} ,'A' ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE )
mapper.select: /*WorkMgmtMapper.getWorkOwnerList*/ SELECT DECODE(B.OWNER_ID, NULL, '0', '1') AS ROW_CHECK ,A.OWNER_ID ,A.STATUS ,A.OWNER_NM ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.CRET_ID) AS CRET_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.CRET_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CRET_DT ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.AMD_ID) AS AMD_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.AMD_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS AMD_DT FROM NMCP_WORK_OWNER@DL_MCP A ,NMCP_WORK_TMPL_OWNER@DL_MCP B WHERE A.OWNER_ID = B.OWNER_ID(+) AND B.WORK_TMPL_ID(+) = #{workTmplId} AND (A.STATUS = 'A' OR B.OWNER_ID IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY ROW_CHECK DESC, A.OWNER_NM
mapper.insert: /* WorkMgmtMapper.insertWorkRqstr */ INSERT INTO NMCP_WORK_RQSTR@DL_MCP ( RQSTR_ID ,RQSTR_NM ,STATUS ,CRET_ID ,CRET_DT ) VALUES ( TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SQ_WORK_RQSTR.NEXTVAL@DL_MCP, 4, '0') ,#{rqstrNm} ,'A' ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE )
mapper.select: /*WorkMgmtMapper.getWorkRqstrList*/ SELECT DECODE(B.RQSTR_ID, NULL, '0', '1') AS ROW_CHECK ,A.RQSTR_ID ,A.STATUS ,A.RQSTR_NM ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.CRET_ID) AS CRET_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.CRET_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CRET_DT ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.AMD_ID) AS AMD_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.AMD_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS AMD_DT FROM NMCP_WORK_RQSTR@DL_MCP A ,NMCP_WORK_TMPL_RQSTR@DL_MCP B WHERE A.RQSTR_ID = B.RQSTR_ID(+) AND B.WORK_TMPL_ID(+) = #{workTmplId} AND (A.STATUS = 'A' OR B.RQSTR_ID IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY ROW_CHECK DESC, A.RQSTR_NM

/*WorkMgmtMapper.getWorkSmsList*/ SELECT DECODE(B.SMS_TEMPLATE_ID, NULL, '0', '1') AS ROW_CHECK ,A.TEMPLATE_ID AS SMS_TEMPLATE_ID ,A.TEMPLATE_NM AS SMS_TEMPLATE_NM ,A.SUBJECT ,FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0070', A.CALLBACK) AS CALLBACK ,A.TEXT AS SMS_TEXT FROM MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST A ,NMCP_WORK_TMPL_SMS@DL_MCP B WHERE A.TEMPLATE_ID = B.SMS_TEMPLATE_ID(+) AND A.WORK_TYPE = 'DOC' AND B.WORK_TMPL_ID(+) = #{workTmplId} AND A.TEMPLATE_ID != 394 ORDER BY ROW_CHECK DESC, A.TEMPLATE_NM

/*WorkMgmtMapper.getWorkSmsListByWorkTmplId*/ SELECT WTS.SMS_TEMPLATE_ID , SMS.TEMPLATE_NM AS SMS_TEMPLATE_NM , SMS.SUBJECT , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0070', SMS.CALLBACK) AS CALLBACK , SMS.TEXT AS SMS_TEXT FROM NMCP_WORK_TMPL_SMS@DL_MCP WTS , MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST SMS WHERE WTS.WORK_TMPL_ID = #{workTmplId} AND WTS.SMS_TEMPLATE_ID = SMS.TEMPLATE_ID ORDER BY WTS.SMS_TEMPLATE_ID
/* WorkMgmtMapper.getWorkIdList */ SELECT WORK_ID AS VALUE ,WORK_NM AS TEXT FROM EMV_SCAN_WORK@DL_MCP WHERE 1 = 1 AND USE_YN = 'Y'

/* WorkMgmtMapper.getRqstrCdList */ SELECT RQSTR_NM AS TEXT , RQSTR_ID AS VALUE FROM NMCP_WORK_RQSTR@DL_MCP WHERE RQSTR_ID IN ( SELECT WTR.RQSTR_ID FROM NMCP_WORK_TMPL@DL_MCP WT , NMCP_WORK_TMPL_RQSTR@DL_MCP WTR WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN WT.START_DT AND WT.END_DT AND WT.USE_YN = 'Y' AND WT.WORK_TMPL_ID = WTR.WORK_TMPL_ID )
